data.title: XRP Dropped 4% In March, But April Will Set The Tone For 2026
data.description: In March, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) experienced a 3.6% decline, but recent technical analysis suggests a potential short-term recovery within a broader bearish trend. Analyst ChartNerd highlighted XRP's near-term strength in an Apr. 9 podcast, noting its closing price of around $1.37 and successful reclaiming of the 20-day exponential moving average after bouncing off key support levels. Maintaining levels above $1.36 could lead to targets at the 55-day EMA around $1.42, with resistance in the $1.40–$1.50 range. Further upward movement to $1.60–$1.80 is feasible, although gains might be uneven without a decisive break of resistance. On a weekly basis, XRP remains below crucial levels. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls After Surprise Inflation Data; CoreWeave Jumps On Meta Deal (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation figures. Meanwhile, CoreWeave stock saw a significant increase after finalizing a deal with Meta Platforms. The day's market activity included the Dow falling post the inflation data while CoreWeave soared due to the Meta deal.

data.title: Naväge® Launches the First Ear Cleaner that Washes and Dries[1]
data.description: A leading brand in powered nasal irrigation introduces a new Dual Action system for ear hygiene. With a strong reputation as the top doctor-recommended brand in powered nasal irrigation, Naväge is expanding its offerings. The company, known for its gold-standard approach, is now entering the ear hygiene market. This move comes after a successful decade of being the top brand in powered nasal irrigation.

data.title: Ten Novelis Plants Achieve New Level of Manufacturing Maturity
data.description: Novelis Inc., a top provider of sustainable aluminum solutions and a global leader in aluminum rolling and recycling, has revealed that 10 of its plants have achieved initial certification in the company's new standardized global manufacturing system. This development was announced in Atlanta on April 9, 2026.

data.title: Bimini Capital Management to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, on April 9, 2026, Bimini Capital Management, Inc. (OTCQX: BMNM) shared plans to unveil their first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on Thursday, May 7, 2026.

data.title: JETSET Pilates Announces Grand Opening of Bridgeland Location in Cypress, TX
data.description: A married couple is launching a community-focused Reformer Pilates venture in the flourishing Bridgeland region of Texas on April 9, 2026. JETSET Pilates, a popular Reformer Pilates chain known for its high-quality, full-body exercise sessions, is now entering the area to cater to the increasing demand.

data.title: Emera Incorporated Announces Conversion Privilege of Cumulative Minimum Rate Reset First Preferred Shares, Series J
data.description: Nova Scotia - Emera Incorporated (“Emera” or the “Company”) (TSX/NYSE: EMA) stated today that it does not plan to redeem any portion of the 8,000,000 Cumulative Minimum Rate Reset First Preferred Shares, Series J (the “Series J Shares”) on May 15, 2026. The decision was disclosed in the March 26, 2021 prospectus supplement of the Company and is subject to specific conditions.

data.title: Kyndryl Launches AI-Powered Digital Twin for the Workplace
data.description: Kyndryl, a prominent provider of enterprise technology services, introduced their new solution on April 9, 2026. The solution is built on Microsoft Foundry and aims to assist enterprises in forecasting, averting, and addressing technology interruptions. Operating under the NYSE ticker symbol KD, Kyndryl specializes in delivering mission-critical services to businesses. The latest offering, known as Kyndryl Digital Twin, showcases the company's commitment to addressing technological challenges in the corporate sector.
